mapper.sql: p.place_id AS placeId, p.name, p.category, p.region, p.description, p.address, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT place_id AS placeId, name, category, region, description, address, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM places ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.name, p.category, p.region, p.description, p.address, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) FROM reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.place_id) AS avgRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.place_id) AS reviewCount FROM places p
AND p.region = #{region}
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY avgRating DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY reviewCount DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT place_id AS placeId, name, category, region, description, address, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM places WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places (name, category, region, description, address, image_url) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{region}, #{description}, #{address}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.name, p.category, p.region, p.description, p.address, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) FROM reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.place_id) AS avgRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.place_id) AS reviewCount FROM places p ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.place_id) DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
